details.address: 20920 Torrence Chapel Rd B6, Cornelius, NC 28031

raw_data.address: 20920 Torrence Chapel Rd B6, Cornelius, NC 28031
raw_data.name: Walls of Books

reviews_data.review_text: Fantastic selection, I’d highly recommend coming here for a wide assortment of books & incredibly friendly staff. I also really enjoy the trade back program!

I’ve been to better priced used book stores. Most paperback books I picked up were $8.97, doesn’t sound too bad. But when comparing those used books to brand new copies on Amazon, they were only 30 cents to $1 difference. Books I picked up in that price range had bent covers or ripped corners—definitely not going to pay almost same price as new esp. in that shape. Cashier also was on her phone the entire time we were shopping.
Really cute bookstore! Huge selection! I love it 😍
an amazing book store with both used and new books. was able to pick up a few that were on my list. even though it is a drive from Charlotte it's worth it.
Love this cozy bookstore!

This bookstore is clean and well-organized, but its nonfiction selection is intellectually impoverished. For instance, there were at least a dozen Bill O’Reilly books, compared to precious few works by actual historians.
Cute store and a decent selection of books.

reviews_data.owner_answer: So nice to meet you, Rachel. I hope to see you again soon! Thank you.
reviews_data.review_text: A really cute bookshop with majority used books, but also a small section of new. The YA and Teen section felt like walking into a Barnes and Noble circa 2010 and it was awesome. Very fun to peruse the shelves and grab some books. The prices on most seemed very reasonable. It’s even better if you live in the area as they offer trade in options that give you credits towards your next purchase. Organized alphabetically by author. The staff member was helpful with questions and suggestions based on books I said I’d previously enjoyed.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you, Ashley! Hope to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Great local bookstore! Always a great selection! Check their Facebook page for any current promotions!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks very much!
reviews_data.review_text: One of my favorite used bookstores, literally wall to wall books. Great atmosphere and you can get credits by donating old books.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you very much! We hope you’ll visit again soon!
reviews_data.review_text:
Such a great used bookstore! The lady working there was super nice and really helpful. She answered all my questions about book recommendations, showed me where to find things, and even helped me track down a specific book that was tucked away. The store is very well organized and has a cozy atmosphere.

I ended up buying three books during my visit and can’t wait to go back. One thing I’m especially excited about is their Trade Back program; if you bring back one of their books with the yellow sticker after you’ve read it, they give you a higher store credit to use toward another book. Love that idea and can’t wait to make use of it!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you! So glad you enjoyed your visit. Hope we’ll see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: A treasure trove of books, many used in very good shape and some new ones. When you buy a book and return it, you get half the purchase price back in a store credit. A very fun place to visit.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much! We look forward to seeing you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: This place has a little bit of everything, even some new stock! I went for the used section and was not disappointed by the variety

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you, Kerrigan. We hope to see you again very soon!
reviews_data.review_text: One of my favorite bookstores in the area, mostly used books yet the inventory seems to move steadily, I never walk out empty handed.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you, Dana! We hope you’ll be back soon! Enjoy the crawl!
reviews_data.review_text: I am participating in the Freater Charlotte book crawl this year and this was my seventh stop. The lady attending the store was super sweet and super helpful. The place is super cozy, and there is such a wide variety of books from reference books, books pertaining to certain hobbies, even Manga and so much more, you'll be there for hours, they even sell audiobooks CD's. I found a very popular book that was being sold  for five dollars cheaper and I was super excited. They have a trade system where if you bring books in, then you will get in- store credit for up to 50% or if you bought a book from them that has a yellow sticker and you return it (the yellow sticker must be in tact) then you will receive a 50% back in store credit. For local authors who want to have their books in this store, you must contact Melinda, the owner of the bookstore via email and she we'll tell you the process and where to go from there.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Christina, I apologize for interrupting, I thought you completed your question when you asked if we accepted electronic gift cards. We can accept them if you can use them the way you use Apple Pay, but if we have to manually type in numbers, we cannot. If you have further questions, please let us know. Thank you.
reviews_data.review_text: I like this bookstore but I wish the person who worked there listened to questions better. I wanted to spend a giftcard here and before I could even get my question out to verify if they accepted them I was interrupted, told no, and had to slowly repeat myself again. They do accept gift cards by the way, for those who want to spend their money locally and not on Amazon. But not electronic ones.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much! I’m looking forward to seeing you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: I went to Wall of Books for the first time yesterday after not even knowing it was there. I will definitely be going back. The lady running the shop was incredibly helpful and sweet. The shop itself is lovely. There were so many books to choose from and everything is so well organized with everything put into separate sections and alphabetized by author. My three favorite things about this store is the amount of comfy chairs inside where you can sit and read, the fact that you can return some of the books for a discount towards your next purchase, and the "blind date books" where you don't know what book you're getting until you open the package (you get a general description of genre to choose from). I will say, this store isn't very accessible because of the small doorway with a moderately high frame and cramped aisles, so if you're a wheelchair user or have mobility issues, be conscious of that when visiting.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you! We’re so glad you found us!
reviews_data.review_text: Great prices, friendly staff, and super cozy atmosphere.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much, Josephine! We love Brianna too. Thrilled you loved my bookstore and I’m looking forward to seeing you there!
reviews_data.review_text:
If I could give this sweet little bookstore, 10 stars, I would. The owner Melinda Hall runs this quaint bookstore and her love for books is evident in the way she laid out her lovely little shop. They offer new and used books. There is a charm in the hidden nooks and crannies. I love it!

They have a used book buy back system. Look into the details. I’m not sure how that works.

The next time you are in the area -Check out this independent bookstore Save it here on Google Maps and route yourself to it. So worth it!

PS I think Brianna, whom was working when I stopped by, is a sweeheart!

Shop local ❤️

Josephine Local Guide

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you! Looking forward to seeing you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Very cute store, well organized, friendly staff, and clean bathroom.

reviews_data.owner_answer: What a compliment! Thank you!
reviews_data.review_text: A diamond in the hectic rough.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much! We look forward to seeing you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: I love this bookstore!  It's so clean and well lit.  You walk in and are hit with the wonderful aroma of old books waiting to be discovered.   I appreciate the ability to take in the books I've read for credit towards buying more.  The prices are very reasonable and I can always find 1 - or 20 - books for my collection.   The staff is super friendly and helpful.  When you're in the area, definitely stop by and plan to stay a while so you can explore every nook and cranny!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much, Jada! Looking forward to seeing you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: I was like a kid in a candy store in here, i got 4 books! I am so excited, there are so many options. This is a jack pot of books!!!!! 10/10 recommend! 😊

This is a great little used-book store! I went with my mom and cousin and we all found something to buy. It was a bit cramped for my mobility scooter, though. I couldn't get down all the rows, but it was still fun.

So grateful for Walls of Books! Melinda has been so kind to search and find multiple copies and titles of books for a book club I'm in and most recently helped fulfilled some items on holiday wish lists.  Pricing is incredibly reasonable (most always lower than amazon) and turn around time for special order books is quick!
Excellent selection of books in a comfortable atmosphere. Great book store layout.
Excellent selections and great family environment

reviews_data.author_title: Law Offices of Debra Harpe PLLC
reviews_data.review_text: This is a wonderful little used bookstore.
Cut little shop. It's worth a stop.
Excellent selection of books, reasonably priced, the service and information offered were excellent.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you! Hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: It's a very fun and creative space with a good selection of Scifi/fantasy, biographies, and YA books.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you, Brie! Looking forward to seeing you again very soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Great store! Has a whole lot of good books and the workers are amazing. Definitely going back!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much! Hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Such an awesome spot!!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you!
reviews_data.review_text: Such a  great selection !
Neat little used book store.  But wish it was open after 5pm or Sundays.
Small store so limited selection. You can find some real treasures though.
Great place to scope out some books. They have a huge classic section! And a ton of fiction. They also have a buyback program where 50% if your purchase can be credited if you bring your book back.
The store is not organized well, hard to find things. And got store credit and couldn't use all of the credit I was given... definitely disappointed
Great selection of books!  Cozy atmosphere.  Friendly staff!
My daughter really liked this store as there were a great variety of books. Also, the prices are very affordable. I would definitely recommend.
Large array of books of all genres and authors.
We love Walls of Books! Tons to choose from and always friendly. Great store credit for your used books too!

A nice little used book store. Being small, it doesn't have the selection that I'm used to,but I did find a book in the series I was looking for. I'd go back, the service was friendly and helpful. It just won't be my first choice because my usual used book store is larger and less of a drive.

This place is dreadful. The people working there have treated members of my family and me like we’re interrupting some important business they are conducting when we’ve gone in. The books that I was able to find were overpriced for the garbage condition they were in. My daughter asked if we could get a new copy of one of them because the pages were brown and smelly. Went in today and was ready to buy all of the Jon Meacham and Ronald Dahl books they had and the guy told me that I’d need to hurry up because they were about to close. I just left. Won’t go back. Probably lost a $50 sale because some dude had some incredibly important business to attend to at 4:55 pm.

Nice local book store. Good customer service. I like the option of getting a percentage of the purchase back towards another book. For a small store it has a wide selection of books and gifts. There is a lot of parking in front of the store.

One of my all time favorite used bookstores ! Personally every time I go , i find a book I’ve been looking for/wanting to read. Absolutely love the atmosphere and the owner is amazing and very friendly! Books are prices very fair and match the condition they are in.

My mother loves this place. If you bring in books to donate they'll give you points (rewards) to use towards your next purchase. Great way of giving back and to inspire you to finish those unfinished books.
Mostly fiction
Love this book store! I can always find a gem and the owner does a great job of keeping the store clean and organized.
I love this place
What a lovely place to visit. We found it just be chance but we shall return.
If they don't have it, you don't need to read it

Small space filled to the brim with books, mostly used but some new. The flow of generes was a little difficult to navigate. Lots of categories  with books arranged alphabetically.  Big selection. Cramped aisles. Books were in great shape, but seemed a little pricey for used books. No database for their inventory. Very clean bathroom. Overall a great place to buy books with a few minor drawbacks.
Absolutely excellent. Great selection of books and the staff is incredibly helpful and kind. The best used bookstore I've found in the area.
More options on books selections
Loved!
LOVE this store!! Nothing short of excellent EVERY time. Thank you--
Omggg will definitely be back!! Amazing selection of books for an amazing price. 10/10!
You can probably find any book you're looking for here. If not, they'll order it. They will also give you credits for books you bring to them.
I could get lost in this place (in a good way), they have so many books, well organized, and helpful staff.
Great little shop! Way more books than you'd expect. Keeps going around a corner in the back.
Wall to wall books, could spend hours in there. Kind of place I wish they were all like. Owner is fantastic, cat is adorable.
So many books without feeling cluttered.  I've never walked out without finding at least one new-to-me book that I love.
Top notch.
Love this used bookstore. Has all subjects and genres. Great place to explore and get gifts for book lovers!
Great store.  Appreciate their use of masks.great selection of books.
They were helpful I will return and search for my book again.
There are books and a cat.
Great variety of books, a very cozy place. However employee not wearing mask. A couple other customers came in not wearing masks.

One of my favorite bookstores that I’ve visited. You can bring in books for store credit! If you bring back books and keep the sticker on, you get even more store credit. They have new stock in always. They do recommendations. This is in the Lake Norman area so I’m not surprised by some of the snotty reviews.

No oNe aSkEd iF I NeEdEd hElP ... it’s a bookstore. How much help to you need? Open your mouth and ask a question LOL. I’m not greeted every single time I enter and it’s really not that serious 😂.

Anyways, the ladies that work there are all very kind! The store is organized by the author’s last name starting on the right side and it swings around. There are special spots for certain genres. There used to be a store cat but I haven’t seen her in a awhile. Precious chunkieeee girl.
The space is well utilized

Nice little store that you feel like you can get lost in. I almost always find something and think "I can't believe they have this!" We will definitely continue to come here, first, to find whatever book we are looking for.
Awesome locally-owed bookstore! Offering both secondhand AND new books, along with book lovers gifts. Very friendly and welcoming!❤

Very delighted to find this book store only a few miles from my house.  They have a ton of books both new and used and the prices are great.  You can also bring in used books for store credit.  I was in the store for over 30 minutes and was never asked if I needed any help (nor did I go ask for help).  Feedback- this is a great place if you aren't looking for a specific book as the books aren't very well organized and there were stacks in multiple places up against the book shelves.

Prices aren't bad but service and helpfulness needs some work.  Its pretty bad when people running store or children of owner I believe have a snobbish additude toward customers. Books not in order but person working would rather be setting reading than taking care of store.when asked questions about how process worked acted like it was a bother to explain process.
I love this bookstore! Always friendly staff! Plus seeing Calliope is always a plus!
Awesome little independent bookstore. Great selection and prices and very friendly staff. Will definitely be back.

I found the woman working today,July 24, pm very rude! One area I was trying to look in had two huge bean bags in the center of the area and after trying to place my feet, I tried to leave the area only to find a huge cat in the middle of the door. I stopped immediately. Employee was looking at her phone she said, "come on he will move!" I said, "No I just had surgery from falling." Finally the cat moved. I selected 6 books and paid for them. Employee never said a word to me just handed me my change. No customer service whatsoever! Did not ask me if I found everything I was looking for, thank you for coming in!!!!! I am sorry this is not acceptable in my view point. Never will I put my foot in there again.

I found Wall of Books when I moved to Cornelius a few months ago while trying to familiarize myself with the area. To start, the owner Melinda is a very lovely woman with an endless passion and knowledge for and of books. The gentleman who posted the 1 star review either caught her in a phenomenally bad moment or he came in with a serious attitude because I have always had nothing but pleasant encounters with her. Caliope is a wonderfully happy chonk of a kitty who just adds a serene boost to the atmosphere. The book selection has variety and organization, and in the off chance you can't find what you're looking for, Melinda will order it for you! It is a shame I am leaving next month. I will miss this shop and especially little Caliope ❤

As a book lover and a cat lover, I should no doubt love this place, right?  Well, nothing could be further from the truth.  Calliope's a sweet little rescue kitty, but the lady behind the counter (presumably the owner) was perhaps the most disinterested and lackadaisical proprietor I've ever seen in a book store in my life--and I've been in hundreds, if not thousands.  The books aren't very organized either and after asking for some help, she just pointed in a general direction and went back to her obviously more important task of doing something on her phone.  I certainly have no intention of ever returning to this "establishment" again.
Just discovered this place on my lunch hour this week. Went back 2 more times in one week!

Wide variety. Reasonable prices. Clean. Nothing to complain about.

They have a trade-in program where you get half of what you paid for a used book in store credit.
The staff is so friendly!! Love this store

Found Walls of Books, in Cornelius, by chance as I drove past their location on the interstate. I had no idea we had two local bookstores in the Lake Norman area, so I was excited to drive over and visit the location. I was so pleasantly surprised by the wide variety of new and used books, and the prices are fantastic. I also love the book memorabilia and kids toys that are scattered around the store. It's so important that we support all of our local bookstores in Charlotte. We have so few that we must take advantage of all they have to offer.  I will be spending many days at Walls of Books. They had a used book, in perfect condition, that I have been searching for, for quite some time. Such a pleasant surprise all around! I cannot wait to share it with other book lovers! The shopping center around the bookstore is also fantastic, so many wonderful food options, my favorites are Sangam Indian Cuisine Restaurant and Ferrucci's Old Tyme Italian Market.
Coolest nook I ever seen.

Such a fun book store! The owner is kind and makes you want to come back in often with her great stash of book finds. There are so many nooks of books. We love it! Used and new with a child friendly vibe. Gifts for when you need a last minute and quality find.
A cute bookshop with a great variety! Though the shop is small, you'll find a wonderful mix of new and used books just like I did!
My new favorite place! There really are walls and walls of books, and you can exchange your used books for store credit

We love Walls of Books! Tons to choose from and always friendly. Great store credit for your used books too!

A nice little used book store. Being small, it doesn't have the selection that I'm used to,but I did find a book in the series I was looking for. I'd go back, the service was friendly and helpful. It just won't be my first choice because my usual used book store is larger and less of a drive.

This place is dreadful. The people working there have treated members of my family and me like we’re interrupting some important business they are conducting when we’ve gone in. The books that I was able to find were overpriced for the garbage condition they were in. My daughter asked if we could get a new copy of one of them because the pages were brown and smelly. Went in today and was ready to buy all of the Jon Meacham and Ronald Dahl books they had and the guy told me that I’d need to hurry up because they were about to close. I just left. Won’t go back. Probably lost a $50 sale because some dude had some incredibly important business to attend to at 4:55 pm.

Nice local book store. Good customer service. I like the option of getting a percentage of the purchase back towards another book. For a small store it has a wide selection of books and gifts. There is a lot of parking in front of the store.

One of my all time favorite used bookstores ! Personally every time I go , i find a book I’ve been looking for/wanting to read. Absolutely love the atmosphere and the owner is amazing and very friendly! Books are prices very fair and match the condition they are in.

My mother loves this place. If you bring in books to donate they'll give you points (rewards) to use towards your next purchase. Great way of giving back and to inspire you to finish those unfinished books.
Mostly fiction
Love this book store! I can always find a gem and the owner does a great job of keeping the store clean and organized.
I love this place
What a lovely place to visit. We found it just be chance but we shall return.
If they don't have it, you don't need to read it

Small space filled to the brim with books, mostly used but some new. The flow of generes was a little difficult to navigate. Lots of categories  with books arranged alphabetically.  Big selection. Cramped aisles. Books were in great shape, but seemed a little pricey for used books. No database for their inventory. Very clean bathroom. Overall a great place to buy books with a few minor drawbacks.
Absolutely excellent. Great selection of books and the staff is incredibly helpful and kind. The best used bookstore I've found in the area.
More options on books selections
Loved!
LOVE this store!! Nothing short of excellent EVERY time. Thank you--
Omggg will definitely be back!! Amazing selection of books for an amazing price. 10/10!
You can probably find any book you're looking for here. If not, they'll order it. They will also give you credits for books you bring to them.
I could get lost in this place (in a good way), they have so many books, well organized, and helpful staff.
Great little shop! Way more books than you'd expect. Keeps going around a corner in the back.
Wall to wall books, could spend hours in there. Kind of place I wish they were all like. Owner is fantastic, cat is adorable.
So many books without feeling cluttered.  I've never walked out without finding at least one new-to-me book that I love.
Top notch.
Love this used bookstore. Has all subjects and genres. Great place to explore and get gifts for book lovers!
Great store.  Appreciate their use of masks.great selection of books.
They were helpful I will return and search for my book again.
There are books and a cat.
Great variety of books, a very cozy place. However employee not wearing mask. A couple other customers came in not wearing masks.

One of my favorite bookstores that I’ve visited. You can bring in books for store credit! If you bring back books and keep the sticker on, you get even more store credit. They have new stock in always. They do recommendations. This is in the Lake Norman area so I’m not surprised by some of the snotty reviews.

No oNe aSkEd iF I NeEdEd hElP ... it’s a bookstore. How much help to you need? Open your mouth and ask a question LOL. I’m not greeted every single time I enter and it’s really not that serious 😂.

Anyways, the ladies that work there are all very kind! The store is organized by the author’s last name starting on the right side and it swings around. There are special spots for certain genres. There used to be a store cat but I haven’t seen her in a awhile. Precious chunkieeee girl.
The space is well utilized

Nice little store that you feel like you can get lost in. I almost always find something and think "I can't believe they have this!" We will definitely continue to come here, first, to find whatever book we are looking for.
Awesome locally-owed bookstore! Offering both secondhand AND new books, along with book lovers gifts. Very friendly and welcoming!❤

Very delighted to find this book store only a few miles from my house.  They have a ton of books both new and used and the prices are great.  You can also bring in used books for store credit.  I was in the store for over 30 minutes and was never asked if I needed any help (nor did I go ask for help).  Feedback- this is a great place if you aren't looking for a specific book as the books aren't very well organized and there were stacks in multiple places up against the book shelves.

Prices aren't bad but service and helpfulness needs some work.  Its pretty bad when people running store or children of owner I believe have a snobbish additude toward customers. Books not in order but person working would rather be setting reading than taking care of store.when asked questions about how process worked acted like it was a bother to explain process.
I love this bookstore! Always friendly staff! Plus seeing Calliope is always a plus!
Awesome little independent bookstore. Great selection and prices and very friendly staff. Will definitely be back.

I found the woman working today,July 24, pm very rude! One area I was trying to look in had two huge bean bags in the center of the area and after trying to place my feet, I tried to leave the area only to find a huge cat in the middle of the door. I stopped immediately. Employee was looking at her phone she said, "come on he will move!" I said, "No I just had surgery from falling." Finally the cat moved. I selected 6 books and paid for them. Employee never said a word to me just handed me my change. No customer service whatsoever! Did not ask me if I found everything I was looking for, thank you for coming in!!!!! I am sorry this is not acceptable in my view point. Never will I put my foot in there again.

I found Wall of Books when I moved to Cornelius a few months ago while trying to familiarize myself with the area. To start, the owner Melinda is a very lovely woman with an endless passion and knowledge for and of books. The gentleman who posted the 1 star review either caught her in a phenomenally bad moment or he came in with a serious attitude because I have always had nothing but pleasant encounters with her. Caliope is a wonderfully happy chonk of a kitty who just adds a serene boost to the atmosphere. The book selection has variety and organization, and in the off chance you can't find what you're looking for, Melinda will order it for you! It is a shame I am leaving next month. I will miss this shop and especially little Caliope ❤

As a book lover and a cat lover, I should no doubt love this place, right?  Well, nothing could be further from the truth.  Calliope's a sweet little rescue kitty, but the lady behind the counter (presumably the owner) was perhaps the most disinterested and lackadaisical proprietor I've ever seen in a book store in my life--and I've been in hundreds, if not thousands.  The books aren't very organized either and after asking for some help, she just pointed in a general direction and went back to her obviously more important task of doing something on her phone.  I certainly have no intention of ever returning to this "establishment" again.
Just discovered this place on my lunch hour this week. Went back 2 more times in one week!

Wide variety. Reasonable prices. Clean. Nothing to complain about.

They have a trade-in program where you get half of what you paid for a used book in store credit.
The staff is so friendly!! Love this store

Found Walls of Books, in Cornelius, by chance as I drove past their location on the interstate. I had no idea we had two local bookstores in the Lake Norman area, so I was excited to drive over and visit the location. I was so pleasantly surprised by the wide variety of new and used books, and the prices are fantastic. I also love the book memorabilia and kids toys that are scattered around the store. It's so important that we support all of our local bookstores in Charlotte. We have so few that we must take advantage of all they have to offer.  I will be spending many days at Walls of Books. They had a used book, in perfect condition, that I have been searching for, for quite some time. Such a pleasant surprise all around! I cannot wait to share it with other book lovers! The shopping center around the bookstore is also fantastic, so many wonderful food options, my favorites are Sangam Indian Cuisine Restaurant and Ferrucci's Old Tyme Italian Market.
Coolest nook I ever seen.

Such a fun book store! The owner is kind and makes you want to come back in often with her great stash of book finds. There are so many nooks of books. We love it! Used and new with a child friendly vibe. Gifts for when you need a last minute and quality find.
A cute bookshop with a great variety! Though the shop is small, you'll find a wonderful mix of new and used books just like I did!
My new favorite place! There really are walls and walls of books, and you can exchange your used books for store credit
